description: A controlled on/off switch showing an icon per state. `confirm` gates a high-impact change through a ConfirmDialog before it applies.

state.description: The current on/off value. Controlled — the consumer owns it and pushes it each render.

orientation.description: Whether the switch lies horizontally or stands vertically.

iconOn.description: A Phosphor class name for the glyph shown while on. Arena draws the aria-hidden `<i>`.

iconOff.description: A Phosphor class name for the glyph shown while off.

label.description: The accessible name for the switch, also drawn beside it.

confirm.description: When set, a change is not applied on the fly — it is requested through `requestChange` so the host can confirm it first.

requestChange.description: A change was requested while `confirm` is set — the host opens a ConfirmDialog and, on confirmation, flips `state` (the requested value is always the negation of the current one).
